use clap::Parser;

#[derive(Debug, Parser)]
struct Cli {
    #[arg(long, env = "GITHUB_TOKEN")]
    github_token: String,

    #[arg(long, env = "NPM_TOKEN")]
    npm_token: String,

    #[arg(long)]
    username: String,
}

fn main() {
    let cli = Cli::parse();
    println!("connecting as {}", cli.username);
}
